description: The wormhole system kills route resolves character/corp/alliance names per-row without hitting the existing batch resolver. Switch to the shared `ESINameCache` (used in dashboard/contracts) so repeat resolutions land in cache and bulk calls go through the batched `/universe/names/` endpoint. Should noticeably drop ESI traffic on busy w-space systems and reduce 429 risk.
title: ESI name caching in wormhole kills route
